questionText: Is there board-level oversight of environmental issues within your organization?
questionKo: 조직 내에 환경이슈에 대한 이사회 수준의 감독기구가 있습니까?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: To address environmental challenges, it is essential that organizations incorporate environmental issues into their governance procedures. This question provides data users with an indication of your level of commitment to addressing environmental issues in your organization.

columns.text: Board-level oversight of this environmental issue
options: No, but we plan to within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to within the next two years
optionsKo: 아니요, 하지만 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획입니다
아니요, 향후 2년 이내에 진행할 계획이 없습니다

columns.text: Primary reason for no board-level oversight of this environmental issue
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 에 대한 -수준 이 환경 이슈

columns.text: Explain why your organization does not have board-level oversight of this environmental issue
columns.textKo: 설명 왜 귀사의 조직 아님 -수준 이 환경 이슈

guidance.text: No change; New question for Ocean
This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Board of directors or equivalent governing body" of 4.1.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
If your organization has an equivalent governing body, respond based on the equivalent governing body. 
If your organization has two-tier board system, respond with respect to your board structure as a whole. 
Board-level oversight of this environmental issue (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if your organization's board or equivalent governing body takes into account environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities relating to the environmental issue in column 0 "Environmental issue" when, for example: 
reviewing and guiding business strategy, the risk management approach and annual budgets; 
overseeing the organization's employee incentives, major capital expenditures, acquisitions, and divestitures; 
monitoring progress towards targets; and/or 
approving and monitoring corporate policies and/or commitments. 
Explain why your organization does not have board-level oversight of this environmental issue (column 3) 
This column only appears if either "No..." option is selected in column 1 "Board-level oversight of this environmental issue". 
Describe the primary reason selected in column 2 "Primary reason for no board-level oversight of this environmental issue" and explain any plans to address this in the future. 
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 2 "Primary reason for no board-level oversight of this environmental issue", explain the criteria used to decide that board-level oversight of the environmental issue in column 0 "Environmental issue" is not important to your organization.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: The board oversees, through a dedicated position or committee with accountability, issues relating to their identified environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text: Board-level oversight: this involves the board having direct responsibility and accountability; for example, for setting commitments and guiding strategy, ensuring the efficacy and efficiency of management, for financial stability and regulatory compliance, and reviewing the progress of objectives and policies.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
For 'Climate change' row(s):
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: '기후변화' 행: 표시된 셀 수에 비례하여 완료된 셀마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 최대 3/3점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
For 'Climate change' row(s):
'Yes' selected in column 'Board-level oversight of this environmental issue' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
For 'Climate change' row(s):
'No, but we plan to within the next two years' selected in column 'Board-level oversight of this environmental issue' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

change.question_ko: 조직 내에 환경이슈에 대한 이사회 수준의 감독기구가 있습니까?
change.q2025_text: Is there board-level oversight of environmental issues within your organization?
change.change_status: No change; new question for Ocean; detail changes
change.daml_summary: General: D 3/3 | A 0.5 or 1/1 | M 1/1 | L 0/0
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked
change.change_statusKo: 변경 없음; 신규 문항 해양; 세부 정보 변경사항
change.q2025_textKo: 조직 내에 환경이슈에 대한 이사회 수준의 감독기구가 있습니까?

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 기후 변경, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '조직 내에 환경이슈에 대한 이사회 수준의 감독기구가 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
